---
title: "Setup"
---

## Git
- [Git: Topic 1](git/page01.qmd)
- [Git: Topic 2](git/page02.qmd)
- [Git: Topic 3](git/page03.qmd)
- [Git: Topic 4](git/page04.qmd)
- [Git: Topic 5](git/page05.qmd)

## R
- [R: Topic 1](r/page01.qmd)
- [R: Topic 2](r/page02.qmd)
- [R: Topic 3](r/page03.qmd)
- [R: Topic 4](r/page04.qmd)
- [R: Topic 5](r/page05.qmd)
